# InkMaster Studio

> InkMaster Studio is a browser-based print production workspace for turning uploaded artwork into print-ready DTG and DTF files, mockups, proofs, and handoff packages.

## Product

- [InkMaster Studio](https://inkmasterstudio.com/): Guided local-first artwork preflight and production packaging for print shops.

## Capabilities

- Artwork upload and local job setup
- DTG and DTF preflight checks
- Guided print recipe selection
- Artwork cleanup and background removal
- Apparel mockups and proof approval
- Production package exports

## Notes

- User artwork is handled through the app workflow.
- AI cleanup requests are routed through server-side API handling rather than exposing provider keys in the browser.
